name: antigravity
description: Free AI models — Gemini 1.5 Pro + Claude 3.5 Sonnet via OAuth (Google provider)

gemini-1.5-pro.description: Google Gemini 1.5 Pro — free via Antigravity OAuth

claude-sonnet-3.5.description: Claude 3.5 Sonnet — free via Antigravity OAuth

steps: 1. Copy the Antigravity prompt from GitHub into OpenCode chat
3. Run 'opencode auth' in a new terminal
4. Select Google provider → complete OAuth flow
5. Restart OpenCode → /models shows Gemini + Claude as free options
